# balena_device_config_var (Resource)

Manages a device-level configuration variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "balena_device_config_var" "gpu_memory" {
  device_id = 123456
  name      = "BALENA_HOST_CONFIG_gpu_mem"
  value     = "128"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (Number) ID of the device.
- `name` (String) Variable name.
- `value` (String) Variable value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier.
